reviews.comment:
Malísimo!!! Hago fila para cargar, espero 10 min y veo que empiezan a hacer fila enfrente. Me meto xq yo estaba antes y no me quieren cargar nafta xq según ellos me metí!!! Malísimo!!!! Por ese motivo no cargue en esa estación de servicio, ni pienso volver. La peor parte? Atrás mío habían otros autos y nadie se acercó a avisarles que iban a tener problemas después para cargar nafta. Un desastre.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible!!! I got in line to fill up, waited 10 minutes, and saw people starting to form a line in front of me. I cut in because I was there first, and they wouldn't let me fill up because, according to them, I cut in line!!! Absolutely awful!!!! That's why I didn't fill up at that station, and I don't plan on going back. The worst part? There were other cars behind me, and nobody came to warn them that they were going to have problems getting gas later. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21SZkxURklOV3RSWHpaS2FXUldPRWR2YTNacVRrRRAB
